stimulus:
Welcome to the experiment.

You will see 140 statements about various topics.

Please read the statements and respond with whether you think they are true (Z key) or false (M key) as quickly as possible!

Press any key to begin.
The next 20 statements will be about Thermodynamics. Press any key to continue.
Coats produce heat.
Cold objects transfer heat to even colder objects.
Cold objects transfer heat to warm objects.
The sun has heat.
Water transfers heat to ice.
Rain produces heat.
Two cups of ice have a lower temperature than one.
Press T if you are paying attention. Do not press z or m.
Ice has a lower temperature than water.
Heat increases an object's temperature.
Pressure produces heat.
Ice has heat.
Heat increases an object's size.
Heat increases an object's weight.
Heat increases an object's color.
Atoms have heat.
Ovens produce heat.
Water transfers heat to steam.
Gravity has heat.
Steam has a lower temperature than ice.
Boiling water has a lower temperature than steam.
The next 20 statements will be about Physiology. Press any key to continue.
A baby can be identical to an older sibling.
Plants turn food into energy.
The sun is alive.
People turn food into energy.
Caterpillars can reproduce.
Clouds can die.
Rocks turn food into energy.
Screwdrivers can die.
Ferns can reproduce.
A baby can be an uncle or an aunt.
Rocks are alive.
Mushrooms can die.
A baby can be a niece or a nephew.
Chairs can reproduce.
A baby can be a mother or a father.
Turtles can die.
Fish are alive.
Bacteria turn food into energy.
Coral is alive.
Press T if you are paying attention. Do not press z or m.
Tigers can reproduce.
The next 20 statements will be about Mechanics. Press any key to continue.
Forces can be balanced or unbalanced.
Constant speed requires constant acceleration.
Press T if you are paying attention. Do not press z or m.
Color can be transferred from one object to another.
Pointy objects fall through air faster than flat objects.
Constant force can yield constant rest.
Constant motion requires constant force.
Constant acceleration requires constant force.
Forces can be straight or curved.
Anvils fall through air faster than feathers.
Forces can be transferred from one object to another.
Energy can be transferred from one object to another.
Bright objects fall through air faster than dark objects.
Heavy balls fall through air faster than light balls.
A moving bullet loses weight.
Forces can be male or female.
Forces can be strong or weak.
Momentum can be transferred from one object to another.
A moving bullet loses speed.
A moving bullet loses height.
A moving bullet loses force.
The next 20 statements will be about Astronomy. Press any key to continue.
The sun produces sound.
The sun revolves around the moon.
Press T if you are paying attention. Do not press z or m.
Phases of the moon are caused by the earth's shadow.
The earth's tilt causes the seasons.
The earth revolves around the sun.
The sun revolves around the earth.
The moon revolves around the earth.
Phases of the moon are caused by clouds.
Planets are more massive than moons.
The moon produces light.
Stars are more massive than planets.
Asteroids are more massive than planets.
The earth's distance from the sun causes the seasons.
The sun produces gravity.
Phases of the moon are caused by changes in illumination.
Phases of the moon are caused by the moon's orbit.
The sun produces light.
The earth's rotation causes the seasons.
A change in overall sunlight causes the seasons.
Planets are more massive than stars.
The next 20 statements will be about Genetics. Press any key to continue.
Two blue-eyed parents could have a brown-eyed baby.
Skin cells have more chromosomes than egg cells.
Viruses can change one's genome.
Pierced ears are heritable.
Press T if you are paying attention. Do not press z or m.
Men have more chromosomes than women.
Exercise can change one's genome.
Humans have more chromosomes than mosquitoes.
Two brown-eyed parents could have a blue-eyed baby.
Adults have more chromosomes than children.
Genes that code for eye color can be found in tears.
Radiation can change one's genome.
Immunity to chickenpox is heritable.
Sunscreen can change one's genome.
Genes that code for eye color can be found in the liver.
A blue-eyed baby must have two blue-eyed parents.
Genes that code for eye color can be found in the eye.
Two brown-eyed parents could have a brown-eyed baby.
Hair color is heritable.
Genes that code for eye color can be found in hair.
Intelligence is heritable.
The next 20 statements will be about Waves. Press any key to continue.
Sound travels through foam.
Mirrors reflect sound.
Rainbows contain all colors of light.
Sound travels through metal.
Red objects absorb red light.
Press T if you are paying attention. Do not press z or m.
Mirrors reflect light.
Sounds can be direct or reflected.
Black objects reflect all colors of light.
Sounds can be dead or alive.
Sounds can be loud or quiet.
White light contains all colors of light.
Sound travels through a vacuum.
Sounds can be near or far.
Red objects reflect red light.
Shadows contain all colors of light.
Prisms reflect light.
Red objects reflect blue light.
Sound travels through air.
Red objects absorb blue light.
Foam reflects sound.
The next 20 statements will be about Matter. Press any key to continue.
Fire is composed of matter.
A cold penny is denser than a hot penny.
A log can be cut in half.
Rocks are composed of matter.
A grain of sand can be cut in half.
Steel is denser than foam.
A liter of water weighs more than a liter of air.
Press T if you are paying attention. Do not press z or m.
Atoms are the constituents of matter.
A shadow can be cut in half.
An idea can be cut in half.
Ice is denser than water.
A liter of water weighs more than a liter of ice.
Foam is denser than brick.
Atoms are weightless.
Numbers are composed of matter.
A pound of steel weighs more than a ton of steel.
Air is composed of matter.
Atoms are mostly empty space.
Atoms are visible to the naked eye.
A pound of steel weighs more than a pound of feathers.

Thank you for completing this portion of the experiment. We now have a few questions for you.

Press any key to proceed, and click submit once you are done with the questions. Thanks!
